title: エブリデイがマーベラス☆★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Mmm, this rice is piping hot! ♪ How deliciously
marvelous! ★

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: But wait, how does the rice keep so moist?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I know! It stays nice and moist because of all the
steam gushing through!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! ☆ I see it now, it's the steam! Very
marvelous! ★

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Steamy, steamy water vapor! ☆

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Oh, look! I've found some pussy willow! ☆ Is it a
cat? Or a willow?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I know! It's gotta be a willow that's like a cat. ♪

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! ☆ Looking at it up close, the buds do kind
of look like bushy cat tails! How extraordinarily
marvelous! ★

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Fluffy, floofy pussy willow! ☆

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Ahahahaaa!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Wow, so many grown-ups! ☆ But why are they in
such a hurry?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I know! They must be super busy working! ♪

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Really?! How hardworking can they be? That's so
marvelous of them! ☆

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Thanks for aaall that you do! ☆

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Keep it up, but don't tire yourself out! ♪

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
And now we're back where we started—Tracen
Academy! Where we run round and round every
day! ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Hm, but why do we Umamusume run? Is there a
reason behind it?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Well, that's because... Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know! It's because there's no end to running!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: There's no end?! Oh, like how the world is round!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
The world is marvelous and endless! ☆ Wherever
we go, there's always more to come! ★

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text:
The world goes round and round! ☆ Today and
tomorrow too! ☆

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Hahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Look at them, they've finally discovered how
boundless the world is.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, being so young, they'll hardly slow down.
At their age, they're invincible. ♪
